userMessage: Add overshoot and undershoot on CH1, then query both results

warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).

response.text:
Built a verified pyvisa flow that adds CH1 overshoot and undershoot measurements and queries both results.
